title: Companion — Paint / Pavement
medium: signal economy audit — six systems plotted along the paint-pavement axis the walk named in step 9. fast/cheap signals (labels, icons, copy, swatches) vs slow/baked-in signals (type grain, motion timing, material, substrate).
caption: Craigslist and Graça are almost all pavement and say so. Apple is pavement in disguise. Median SaaS is almost all paint. The cities and products we actually want to walk in skew toward pavement.
